data-moz-autofill-inspect-id="474171bb-d73b-4f68-a849-5c39f194b73b" data-moz-autofill-type="given-name"> <div class="invalid-feedback"></div> </div><div class="form-group"><div class="form-text">Belföldi adóalanyok esetében adószám, illetve amennyiben rendelkezik ilyennel, akkor csoportazonosító. Adószám nélküli egyesületek, alapítványok, vagy külföldi adóalanyok esetében kérjük írja be az "EGYEB" szót.</div></div> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label for="salutation" id="salutation-label" <div class="intl-tel-input allow-dropdown"><div class="flag-container"><div class="selected-flag" role="combobox" aria-owns="country-listbox" tabindex="0" title="Hungary (Magyarország): +36"><div class="iti-flag hu"></div><div class="iti-arrow"></div></div><ul class="country-list hide" id="country-listbox" aria-expanded="false" role="listbox" aria-activedescendant="iti-item-hu"><li class="country preferred" id="iti-item-us" role="option" data-dial-code="1" data-country-code="us" aria-selected="false"><div class="flag-box"><div class="iti-flag us"></div></div><span class="country-name">United States</span><span class="dial-code">+1</span></li><li class="country preferred" id="iti-item-gb" role="option" data-dial-code="44" data-country-code="gb" aria-selected="false"><div class="flag-box"><div class="iti-flag gb"></div></div><span class="country-name">United Kingdom</span><span class="dial-code">+44</span></li><li class="divider" role="separator" aria-disabled="true"></li><li class="country" id="iti-item-af" role="option" data-dial-code="93" data-country-code="af" aria-selected="false"><div class="flag-box"><div class="iti-flag af"></div></div><span class="country-name">Afghanistan (‫افغانستان‬‎)</span><span class="dial-code">+93</span></li><li class="country" id="iti-item-al" role="option" data-dial-code="355" data-country-code="al" aria-selected="false"><div class="flag-box"><div class="iti-flag al"></div></div><span class="country-name">Albania (Shqipëri)</span><span class="dial-code">+355</span></li><li class="country" id="iti-item-dz" role="option" data-dial-code="213" data-country-code="dz" aria-selected="false"><div class="flag-box"><div class="iti-flag dz"></div></div><span class="country-name">Algeria (‫الجزائر‬‎)</span><span class="dial-code">+213</span></li><li class="country" id="iti-item-as" role="option" data-dial-code="1684" data-country-code="as" aria-selected="false"><div class="flag-box"><div class="iti-flag as"></div></div><span class="country-name">American Samoa</span><span class="dial-code">+1684</span></li><li class="country" id="iti-item-ad" role="option" data-dial-code="376" data-country-code="ad" aria-selected="false"><div class="flag-box"><div class="iti-flag ad"></div></div><span class="country-name">Andorra</span><span class="dial-code">+376</span></li><li class="country" id="iti-item-ao" role="option" data-dial-code="244" data-country-code="ao" aria-selected="false"><div class="flag-box"><div class="iti-flag ao"></div></div><span class="country-name">Angola</span><span class="dial-code">+244</span></li><li class="country" id="iti-item-ai" role="option" data-dial-code="1264" data-country-code="ai" aria-selected="false"><div class="flag-box"><div class="iti-flag ai"></div></div><span class="country-name">Anguilla</span><span class="dial-code">+1264</span></li><li class="country" id="iti-item-ag" role="option" data-dial-code="1268" data-country-code="ag" aria-selected="false"><div class="flag-box"><div class="iti-flag ag"></div></div><span class="country-name">Antigua and Barbuda</span><span class="dial-code">+1268</span></li><li class="country" id="iti-item-ar" role="option" data-dial-code="54" id="signBox" style="margin-top: 40px;" tabindex="11" aria-label="Kapcsolattartási adatok" aria-flowto="passwordBox"><fieldset><legend id="signBoxLegend" aria-hidden="true">Kapcsolattartási adatok</legend><div> <div class="form-group d-none" id="signInTypeBox"> <label>Sign In With</label> <div class="form-inline"> <div class="custom-control custom-radio mr-3"> <input checked="checked" class="custom-control-input" id="signInEmail" name="radioSingIn" type="radio" value="email" data-moz-autofill-inspect-id="46b86743-6b9b-4762-853d-2945b1dbe837"> <label class="custom-control-label" for="signInEmail">Email cím</label> </div> <div class="custom-control custom-radio"> <input class="custom-control-input" id="signInMobile" name="radioSingIn" type="radio" value="mobile" data-moz-autofill-inspect-id="5451b39e-67f7-47fd-beca-c7f091311cb7"> <label class="custom-control-label" for="signInMobile">Mobil szám (opcioniális)</label> </div> </div> <div class="invalid-feedback"></div> <div class="d-none alert alert-danger mt-3" id="mobileCodeInstructions">Please note that the code you'll receive is only valid for 24h or 3 wrong attempts. After that, you'll have to register again.</div> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label for="email" id="email-label" tabindex="12">Email cím</label> <input class="form-control form-control-lg rounded-0" id="email" list="domain" mandatory="true" name="email" type="email" tabindex="13" aria-label="E-mail" data-moz-autofill-inspect-id="0214ece3-3052-4c14-9dc5-0f9700a3e781" data-moz-autofill-type="email"> <datalist id="domain"> </datalist> <div class="invalid-feedback"></div> </div> <div class="form-group"> <label for="mobileNumber" id="mobileNumber-label" tabindex="14">Mobil szám (opcioniális)</label> <div class="intl-tel-input allow-dropdown"><div class="flag-container"><div class="selected-flag" role="combobox" aria-owns="country-listbox" tabindex="20" title="Hungary (Magyarország): +36"><div class="iti-flag hu"></div><div class="dynamic-dial-code"> +36</div><div class="iti-arrow"></div></div><ul class="country-list hide" id="country-listbox" aria-expanded="false" role="listbox" aria-activedescendant="iti-item-hu"><li class="country preferred" id="iti-item-us" role="option" data-dial-code="1" data-country-code="us" Kingdom</span><span class="dial-code">+44</span></li><li class="divider" role="separator" aria-disabled="true"></li><li class="country" id="iti-item-af" role="option" data-dial-code="93" (opcionális)" id="AIT_01-label" tabindex="0"><span aria-hidden="true">Hozzájárulok, hogy az Auchan vásárlási szokásaim, kiküldött üzeneteiben és oldalain tanúsított viselkedésem alapján személyre szabott ajánlatokat, kereskedelmi kommunikációt jelenítsen meg közösségi média és más 3. félhez tartozó felületeken. align-middle w-100" id="toLogin"> Vissza az oldalra </button> <p class="mt-2" style="font-size:.7em;">*Hozzájárulok, hogy a reklámtartalom vásárlási szokásaim, a kiküldött direktmarketing üzenetekben és az Auchan oldalakon tanúsított viselkedésem alapján személyre szabott, automatizált döntéshozatal útján keletkező ajánlatokat is tartalmazzon, jelenítsen meg számomra.</p></div> <div class="pb-4 d-none" id="legalAreaBox"> <p contenteditable="false" id="legalAreaText">Please put here your legal information about data processing</p> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div>
